sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n7302" key="a)na/prasis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀνάπρᾱσις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n7302.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">retail dealing,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:7:12" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.12</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
